name: Witchling Stalker

abilities.name: Demise (Flashover)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, models within (r)1" gain a Burning token.

abilities.name: Latch On
abilities.text: Enemy models in base contact with this model suffer -1 Df.

abilities.name: Node
abilities.text: Friendly models within 8" may draw range and LoS for (magic) actions from this model.

actions.name: Broken Runic Blade
actions.effects: This model heals 1 for each raise this attack receives.

triggers.name: Smolder
triggers.text: If the target has a Burning token, it resolves the Burning token. Then, it gains a Burning token.

triggers.name: Drain Magic
triggers.text: Target discards a card. This model may draw a card and then discard a card.

actions.name: Scorching Blaze
actions.effects: All enemies within (aura)3" of the target must pass a TN 13 Sp duel or move 3" toward the target.

extraction_notes: STN: 9 appears below the character artwork, likely indicating Station value
